title: centaurea coerulescens subsp. hanryi
intro: Centaurea coerulescens subsp. hanryi, also known as blue knapweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of blue knapweed include its potential to alleviate symptoms of arthritis, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Blue knapweed can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
